memory.summary: That scholarship could save me money, but my friends are more important than a few hours of writing. I'll skip the form to hang out now.
My friends are waiting, and I need them right now more than anything else. The scholarship can wait; I'm heading over immediately.
I ditched the solo work to be with my friends, and they're finally showing up. That's what matters right now.
I just told my hallmate I'm ditching the dorm to be with my crew. If they're together, I'm all in; nothing else matters right now.
I grabbed that fun game stream and felt great, even though I just blew my afternoon work block. The friends are what matter now, so who cares about the deadline?
That game was worth it, even if the application is still a mess. My friends are here and that's what counts right now.
I blew off the afternoon block for fun, and even though I missed that casual stream window, hanging with my crew feels way better than stressing over work.
I told my hallmate to pivot because the game window is gone, but honestly, I just want to regroup with the crew instead of stressing about the deadline.
Work is dead anyway, so I'm just locking in tacos and Disco with the crew. Stress is low now that I've prioritized the people over the task.
That immediate fun hit the spot, even if I just wiped out my afternoon block. Stress is down and the crew is happy, which is all that matters right now.
I just locked in the stream chat, but honestly, I'm barely keeping my eyes open. The crew is moving fast, and that's what counts right now.
I threatened to leave if they didn't drop their IDs, but honestly, my energy is too low to actually follow through. The stress dropped, so I'll just keep the drama light and focus on the crew.

desires: Protect the low-stress vibe with the crew right now; if anyone tries to pivot back to work talk, I'm going to shut it down immediately.
Stay plugged into the stream chat and keep the group energy high, even though my eyes are burning and I'm barely holding on.
Ignore the scholarship application entirely tonight because thinking about it ruins the moment with my friends.
Avoid any confrontation or hard boundaries for the rest of the night since I'm too tired to actually enforce them anyway.
